articles.title: Canada May See First Solana ETF as 3iQ Submits ETP Filing
articles.description: Canadian investment firm 3iQ Corp has filed a preliminary prospectus to offer The Solana (SOL) Fund (QSOL) in Canada. This proposed exchange-traded product would be the first Solana ETF listed in North America, expanding the range of cryptocurrency-based ETFs available to investors.
